summary: A day on which you trusted the people in the room to still be there.

voice_notes.notes: Secure attachment reads as the absence of the door-watching that other styles do. We are not certifying the player as healthy; we are describing the texture of a day in which they did not check.

signal_moments: the silence in a conversation you did not rush to fill
the friend's late reply you took at face value
exemplars.output: There was a silence in the middle of a conversation that you did not rush to fill. The friend whose reply came late, you took at face value, without backfilling a story about what their lateness meant. The room had people in it and you trusted the room to still have people in it, and the trust was a small everyday thing.
exemplars.notes: Secure attachment described by absence: no rushing, no backfilling.
